title: M26 1FL, United Utilities Water Limited: environmental permit issued - EPR/HP3431LC/V008
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:   Operator name: United Utilities Water Limited Installation name: Bolton Wastewater Treatment Works Sludge Treatment Installation Permit number: EPR/HP3431LC  "
